name: vocdoni-integrator-sdk
description: Vocdoni Integrator SDK reference skill. Teaches an AI agent the SaaS-first toolkit that replaces @vocdoni/sdk — @vocdoni/api-client, @vocdoni/api-voting, @vocdoni/api-voting-zk, @vocdoni/react-providers, @vocdoni/react-components — covering the bundle/CSP auth → check → sign → vote-tx → relay/job flow, encrypted ballots, and React providers, with copy-pasteable recipes.
